ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood's coordinates */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood's coordinates */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Characteristic of the neighborhood (residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the residents */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "school_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Average school quality rating (1-10) */,
  "public_transportation_accessibility" INTEGER /* Accessibility score for public transportation (1-10) */,
  "shopping_centers_within_1km" INTEGER /* Number of shopping centers within 1 km */,
  "parks_within_1km" INTEGER /* Number of parks within 1 km */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the neighborhood data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the borough */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the residents */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the borough */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "school_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Average school quality rating (1-10) */,
  "public_transportation_accessibility" INTEGER /* Accessibility score for public transportation (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the borough data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POI */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the POI is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the POI */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the POI (school, shopping center, public transportation) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the POI's coordinates */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the POI's coordinates */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the POI (1-5) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the POI */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the POI */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the POI data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_of_interest_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the characteristic belongs to */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the residents */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "school_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Average school quality rating (1-10) */,
  "public_transportation_accessibility" INTEGER /* Accessibility score for public transportation (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the characteristic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_characteristics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (real estate agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the borough where the neighborhood is located
